data.title: Ameresco Partners with Montgomery County Public Schools to Bring Solar Energy Online
data.description: In a collaborative effort between Framingham, Mass.-based Ameresco and Rockville, Md., Ameresco has made significant progress in advancing solar energy solutions for Montgomery Public Schools. This initiative aims to enhance sustainability and reduce energy costs for the school district. The project involves the installation of solar panels across multiple school buildings in the Montgomery district, with an estimated total capacity of X megawatts. This sustainable energy project underscores Ameresco's commitment to promoting renewable energy solutions within educational institutions, fostering environmental stewardship while also driving operational efficiencies.

data.title: iECURE to Present Preliminary Clinical Data from Ongoing OTC-HOPE Trial of ECUR-506 in Neonatal-Onset Ornithine Transcarbamylase Deficiency at the ASGCT and SIMD Annual Meetings
data.description: Philadelphia-based company iECURE will be sharing initial clinical findings from the current OTC-HOPE trial involving ECUR-506 for Neonatal-Onset Ornithine Transcarbamylase Deficiency. The trial is ongoing and the presentation will focus on the preliminary data obtained so far. This information will provide insights into the potential effectiveness of ECUR-506 in addressing this condition.

data.title: HFS Research Launches Data Intelligence Suite, Delivering Proprietary Enterprise Intelligence Across AI, GCCs, Buyer Sentiment, and Pricing
data.description: A recent announcement from HFS Research, a prominent global research and advisory firm, revealed the introduction of a new suite designed to convert exclusive datasets related to AI, global operations, and enterprise investment into practical insights for business executives. This initiative is set to be launched in New York on April 28, 2026.

data.title: ContractorHUB Announces Strategic Investment from Webrunner Media to Deliver End-to-End Growth Infrastructure for Contractors
data.description: A new strategic collaboration has been formed to integrate marketing and operations in order to assist contractors in improving their effectiveness in attracting, converting, and operating efficiently. This partnership has been further strengthened by a significant investment from Webrunner Media. The initiative is led by ContractorHUB, an AI-native operating system designed specifically for this purpose. The announcement was made in Nashville, Tennessee on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Alm. Brand A/S - Supreme Court ruling on workers’ compensation leads to reserve strengthening and a profit warning for 2026
data.description: Today, the Danish Supreme Court made a decision to lower the threshold for lost earnings capacity required for compensation to 5%, which is a significant decrease from the previous 15% threshold set by the Danish Labour Market Insurance.

data.title: Prevent Blindness Debuts "Best Eyes for Life" National Multimedia Campaign as Survey Reveals Concerning Misconceptions on Eye Health
data.description: Prevent Blindness has launched a new campaign featuring characters Iris and Cornelius to promote healthy vision practices and combat misconceptions across all age demographics. This initiative was announced in Chicago on April 28, 2026. Prevent Blindness is recognized as the top patient advocacy group in the country, striving to raise awareness about the importance of vision care.

data.title: Swig® Announces 25-Unit Deal in Southern Florida
data.description: In a recent development on April 28, 2026, in Port St. Lucie, Florida, the renowned beverage brand, Swig, known for originating the Dirty Soda®, has taken a significant step by entering into a multi-unit franchise deal with accomplished franchisee James Laskaris. This agreement marks the brand's expansion in the Sunshine State, solidifying its presence in the region. The signing of this franchise agreement showcases the brand's commitment to growth and reaching a wider audience. This move is anticipated to bring an influx of Dirty Soda® options to consumers in Florida, further boosting the brand's recognition and popularity.

data.title: Brooklyn Steel Co. Expands into Home Electrics with Launch of All-in-One Espresso Machine
data.description: Brooklyn Steel Co. has announced on Apr. 28, 2026, that it is meeting the increasing need for high-quality home experiences by broadening its range of home electronics. The company has introduced its inaugural at-home espresso machine in response to this trend. This launch signifies a new phase in their business as they cater to the evolving demands of consumers.

data.title: Venture Capital Drives Shift Toward Leaner, Scalable Workforce Models
data.description: Venture capital is experiencing a resurgence marked by a focus on efficiency and scalability. Investors are emphasizing these aspects as they prioritize faster execution and cost control. Startups are revisiting their workforce setups to align with these goals, with distributed talent models gaining prominence as a vital strategy to expand operations.

data.title: Report Finds New Homebuyers in Some Cities Pay Double the Property Taxes of Their Neighbors
data.description: A recent report by the Lincoln Institute of Land Policy and Minnesota Center for Fiscal Excellence has shed light on how property tax rates are influenced by public policy, property values, and local spending choices. The report, released in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., on April 28, 2026, underscores the significant role these factors play in determining property tax rates across various regions. The study provides valuable insights into the interplay between government policies, property values, and local expenditures, revealing crucial information for policymakers and taxpayers alike. This comprehensive analysis presents key data and observations that demonstrate the multifaceted nature of property tax systems, offering a deeper understanding of the complexities involved.

data.title: LOCOMOTIVE LAUNCHES K-POP SUPERSTARS AS DEMAND FOR EXPERIENCES GROWS IN U.S.
data.description: A live entertainment studio, LOCOMOTIVE, famous for Bingo Loco, has revealed a new addition to its U.S. lineup with K-Pop Superstars LIVE, a high-energy touring concert. This event aims to tap into shared fandom across generations and promises an electrifying experience. The announcement was made on April 28, 2026, in Denver.

data.title: Youlife Group Inc. Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In the fiscal year 2025, there was a significant increase in revenues by 16.9% amounting to RMB 1,854.3 million. Specifically, the revenue from employee management services saw a notable growth of 24.4% compared to the previous year. The company achieved a net profit of RMB 42.7 million in 2025, a stark improvement from the net loss experienced in 2024. Moreover, there was a 14.0% rise in cash and cash equivalents during the year in contrast to the previous period. This positive financial performance was observed in Shanghai.

data.title: Oncura Health Expands in Orange County with Los Alamitos Clinic Ribbon Cutting on May 4
data.description: In Los Alamitos, California, on April 28, 2026, Oncura Health, previously known as Los Angeles Cancer Network, is set to inaugurate its new clinic with a ribbon-cutting event on May 4, 2026. This marks a significant development for the organization as it rebrands and expands its services to the local community.

data.title: Vuzix Receives Customer-Funded Development Order from Leading Tier-1 Defense Supplier for Next-Generation Waveguide Display Program
data.description: A significant engineering project costing hundreds of thousands of dollars is backing the development of a military display system in Rochester, New York. Vuzix® Corporation (NASDAQ: VUZI), a prominent provider of AI-enabled smart glasses, waveguides, and Augmented Reality (AR) technology, is leading the project. The efforts reflect a focus on advancing production capabilities for the specialized military display system.

data.title: Dundon Advisers LLC and Affiliates Open Manhattan Office and Mark Next Phase of Growth Across Restructuring, Infrastructure, Credit Transactions and Asset Management
data.description: Dundon Advisers LLC, a New York-based firm, has opened a new office in a strategic market to further their presence as they expand their services in restructuring, infrastructure, credit transactions, and asset management. This move comes as the company aims to broaden its reach and solidify its position in the industry. The office, located in New York, was established on April 28, 2026. Dundon's focus on growth is evident as they continue to strengthen their operations in key sectors, showcasing their commitment to providing high-quality services to clients. This development signifies a significant milestone for Dundon Advisers LLC as they navigate the competitive landscape and seek to leverage new opportunities for success.

data.title: LONGBOW PARTNERS EXPANDS NORTH TEXAS PRACTICE WITH ADDITION OF MERCEDES BOLEN
data.description: In Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas on April 28, 2026, Longbow Partners revealed that Mercedes Bolen, a highly regarded external affairs strategist, has joined the firm. Bolen will spearhead efforts in local municipal and county government affairs, public relations, and client communications.

data.title: ParaZero to Showcase DefendAir Counter-UAS Solutions at Three Major International Defense Exhibitions
data.description: ParaZero Technologies Ltd., a leading aerospace defense company listed on Nasdaq as PRZO, will be participating in three prominent international defense exhibitions in the upcoming weeks. The company specializes in developing smart, autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS). At these events, ParaZero will be highlighting its cutting-edge DefendAir Counter-Unmanned Aerial Systems (C-UAS). This announcement was made today in Kfar Saba, Israel.

data.title: SEGG Media Exclusively Partners with Polymarket to Power Sports.com Predict
data.description: Fort Worth, TX - On April 28, 2026, Sports Entertainment Gaming Global Corporation (NASDAQ: SEGG, LTRYW) disclosed a crucial move by entering a state-of-the-art technology collaboration with Polymarket. The partnership specifically aims to enhance Sports.com Predict, the Company’s prediction market platform on Sports.com. This exclusive integration agreement signals a strategic alignment between the two entities, paving the way for significant advancements in the online sports prediction market segment.

data.title: VivoSim Platform Predicts Gastrointestinal Toxicity (Diarrhea) in an AI Model Trained on Human Intestinal Model Results – Without Animal Testing
data.description: The combination of VivoSim's NAMkind™ Intestinal Model with AI prediction tools has shown to produce highly accurate results. This innovative approach has demonstrated a significant success rate in predicting outcomes in the realm of intestinal health. The precision and reliability of this model, coupled with AI technology, have led to remarkable accuracy levels in the analysis and forecasting of intestinal-related data. Researchers have reported a substantial increase in the effectiveness and efficiency of their work due to this powerful combination.

data.title: U.S. FDA Grants Breakthrough Device Designation to Laguna Diagnostics' mRNA Gene Biomarker Test to Aid in Differentiation of Schizophrenia and Bipolar I Disorder
data.description: Laguna Diagnostics, LLC based in Irvine, California reported on April 28, 2026 that their mRNA Gene Biomarker Test has been granted Breakthrough Device Designation by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. This test is blood-based and aims to assist in distinguishing between different conditions. The designation signifies that the FDA recognizes the potential of this novel test to provide significant advantages for healthcare.
